ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the project belongs to */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the project is located */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of grant agreement */,
  "grant_amount" TEXT /* Grant amount in Japanese yen */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "budget_spent" TEXT /* Amount of budget spent so far */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "location" TEXT /* More detailed location information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Education, Health) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (to support hierarchical structure) */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder (e.g., government agency, NGO, private contractor) */,
  "stakeholder_type" TEXT /* Type of stakeholder (e.g., government, non-governmental, private) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the stakeholder */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the stakeholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_stakeholders" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the stakeholder started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the stakeholder's role ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "stakeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Proposal, Report, Budget) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the document */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, stakeholder) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
